Entrapment is the [[triad]] of [[plagues]] which includes [[foreign entrapment]], [[ego entrapment]], and [[empathic entrapment]]

Common between all of them is being trapped in a certain paradigm and unable to change or move past it.

It occurs because someone feels threatened by the ability to change and lose their identity, or feels incapable of understanding another state of being ([[empathic entrapment]])

== Component plagues ==
λα [[foreign entrapment]]

λλ [[ego entrapment]]

λω [[empathic entrapment]]


== History ==
Enstruckment was once considered one of the [[Seven Plagues]] and its [[booster shot]] was assigned as [[larping]].

Splitting it was discussed for a while and made official on October 1, 2022

== New plagues ==
To preserve the [[one prime rule]] and to elaborate on a plague with too large a scope the plague was split into three new plagues

These plagues are not in the work of [[John Vervaeke]] and are far more influenced by [[Alok Kanojia]] than the other ones. 

A vision on October 1, 2022 inspired [[immanuelle]] to include them 

They do not yet have booster shots as of October 13, 2022, but they have some proposals as shown below 

ωα [[Foreign enstuckment|Foreign]] Entrapment - [[Antibodies]]

ωλ [[Ego enstuckment|Ego]] Entrapment - [[Ego Death]]

ωω [[Empathic enstuckment|Empathic]] Entrapment - [[Larping]]
[[Category:Triads]]
[[Category:Perrenial Problems]]
[[sn:Entrapment]][[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Entrapment]][[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Entrapment]]
[[Category:Pages]]
